title: Implement SLIP transport binding for LCI
description: Implement Serial/USB transport per LCI spec 17.3.1: SLIP framing (RFC 1055) over UART/USB-CDC, IPv6 packets in SLIP frames, link-local addressing, MTU handling. Should work with standard SLIP tools (slattach, etc). Test with native_sim serial PTY.
acceptance_criteria: IPv6/CoAP packets flow over SLIP; ping6 and coap-client work against native_sim node
close_reason: Implemented slip_transport.c (567 lines): RFC 1055 SLIP, UART backend, net interface, 13/13 tests pass on EC2
